abstract.t: This document specifies CBOR-encoded PKI structures for use with C509 certificates (draft-ietf-cose-cbor-encoded-cert), X.509 certificates (RFC 5280), and future certificate types. It defines C509 CRL and C509 OCSP, compact CBOR encodings of X.509 Certificate Revocation Lists (RFC 5280) and OCSP messages (RFC 6960), respectively. The structures defined in this document are certificate-type agnostic and can be used with C509 certificates, X.509 certificates, or future certificate types without modification. C509 OCSP improves on RFC 6960 by signing a wider set of fields to prevent algorithm- substitution and certificate-chain substitution attacks, replacing plaintext serial numbers with hashes to preserve requestor privacy, replacing the two-hash issuer identity with a single certificate hash, and identifying all participants (requestor, responder, issuer) by a uniform certificate hash rather than type-specific fields. C509 CRL and C509 OCSP are not wire-format-compatible with their DER- encoded X.509 counterparts and cannot be converted to or from them without semantic interpretation.
